functions.label: deriveAlertDelayModeFromStateTransition
description: Derives alert-delay mode from persisted `state_transition` (same rules as `AlertDelayField`).

functions.label: deriveRecoveryDelayModeFromStateTransition
description: Derives recovery-delay mode from persisted `state_transition` (same rules as `RecoveryDelayField`).

functions.label: DynamicRuleFormFlyout
description: Pre-composed flyout for Discover integration - syncs with external query changes

functions.label: mapFormValuesToCreateRequest
description:
Maps `FormValues` to the create API request payload.
Adds `kind` on top of the common request shape since it is required for creation.
signature: ) => { kind: any; metadata: { name: string; description?: string | undefined; owner?: string | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; }; time_field: string; schedule: { every: string; lookback?: string | undefined; }; evaluation: { query: { base: string; }; }; recovery_policy?: { type: any; query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined; state_transition?: { pending_operator: any; recovering_operator: any; pending_count?: number | undefined; pending_timeframe?: string | undefined; recovering_count?: number | undefined; recovering_timeframe?: string | undefined; } | null | undefined; grouping?: { fields: string[]; } | undefined; no_data?: { behavior: any; timeframe?: string | undefined; } | undefined; artifacts?: { id: string; type: string; value: string; }[] | undefined; }

functions.label: mapFormValuesToRuleRequest
description:
Maps `FormValues` to the common API request shape (snake_case) shared by
both create and update endpoints. Does not include `kind`.

functions.label: mapFormValuesToUpdateRequest
description:
Maps `FormValues` to the update API request payload.
Coerces absent optional fields to `null` so the API interprets them as
explicit removals (as opposed to `undefined` which omits the key entirely).
signature: ) => { metadata?: { name?: string | undefined; description?: string | undefined; owner?: string | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; } | undefined; time_field?: string | undefined; schedule?: { every?: string | undefined; lookback?: string | undefined; } | null | undefined; evaluation?: { query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined; recovery_policy?: { type: any; query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | null | undefined; state_transition?: { pending_operator: any; recovering_operator: any; pending_count?: number | undefined; pending_timeframe?: string | undefined; recovering_count?: number | undefined; recovering_timeframe?: string | undefined; } | null | undefined; grouping?: { fields: string[]; } | null | undefined; no_data?: { behavior: any; timeframe?: string | undefined; } | null | undefined; artifacts?: { id: string; type: string; value: string; }[] | null | undefined; enabled?: boolean | undefined; }

functions.label: mapRuleResponseToFormValues
description:
Maps a `RuleResponse` (API shape, snake_case) to `Partial<FormValues>` (form shape, camelCase).

Only fields present in the response are included so the form defaults fill in the rest.
Use this when populating the edit form with an existing rule's data.
signature: (rule: { kind: any; metadata: { name: string; description?: string | undefined; owner?: string | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; }; time_field: string; schedule: { every: string; lookback?: string | undefined; }; evaluation: { query: { base: string; }; }; id: string; enabled: boolean; createdBy: string | null; createdAt: string; updatedBy: string | null; updatedAt: string; recovery_policy?: { type: any; query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined; state_transition?: { pending_operator: any; recovering_operator: any; pending_count?: number | undefined; pending_timeframe?: string | undefined; recovering_count?: number | undefined; recovering_timeframe?: string | undefined; } | null | undefined; grouping?: { fields: string[]; } | undefined; no_data?: { behavior: any; timeframe?: string | undefined; } | undefined; artifacts?: { id: string; type: string; value: string; }[] | undefined; }) => Partial<

children.label: rule
signature: { kind: any; metadata: { name: string; description?: string | undefined; owner?: string | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; }; time_field: string; schedule: { every: string; lookback?: string | undefined; }; evaluation: { query: { base: string; }; }; id: string; enabled: boolean; createdBy: string | null; createdAt: string; updatedBy: string | null; updatedAt: string; recovery_policy?: { type: any; query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined; state_transition?: { pending_operator: any; recovering_operator: any; pending_count?: number | undefined; pending_timeframe?: string | undefined; recovering_count?: number | undefined; recovering_timeframe?: string | undefined; } | null | undefined; grouping?: { fields: string[]; } | undefined; no_data?: { behavior: any; timeframe?: string | undefined; } | undefined; artifacts?: { id: string; type: string; value: string; }[] | undefined; }

functions.label: RuleFormProvider
description:
Provides services and metadata to all rule form descendants.

`meta` defaults to `{ layout: 'page' }` when omitted.

functions.label: StandaloneRuleFormFlyout
description: Pre-composed flyout for classic experience - static initialization

functions.label: useRuleFormMeta
description: Returns the form metadata (layout, etc.).

functions.label: useRuleFormServices
description: Backward-compatible hook that returns only the services object.

children.label: push
description: Whether to use push flyout or overlay

children.label: onClose
description: Callback when flyout is closed

children.label: query
description: The query that drives form values - changes will sync to form state

children.label: services
description: Required services

children.label: query
description: The query that drives form values - changes will sync to form state

children.label: layout
description: Layout mode: 'page' renders the preview side-by-side; 'flyout' uses a nested flyout. Default: 'page'.

children.label: onSubmit
description:
External submit handler. When provided, form submission delegates to this callback.
When omitted, the form uses `useCreateRule` internally.

children.label: onSuccess
description: Callback invoked after a successful internal submission (useCreateRule).

children.label: includeYaml
description: Whether to include YAML editor toggle (default: false)

children.label: isDisabled
description: Whether the form is in a loading/disabled state

children.label: isSubmitting
description: Whether the form is currently submitting (controls button loading state)

children.label: includeSubmission
description: Whether to show submit/cancel buttons (default: false)

interfaces.label: FormValues
description:
Form values for creating a new alerting rule.
This interface defines the contract for the rule creation form,
independent of the API schema to allow for controlled evolution.

children.label: layout
description: Whether the form is rendered on a full page or inside a flyout.

interfaces.label: RuleRequestCommon
description:
Common rule request shape shared between create and update payloads.
Contains all fields except `kind` (only required for create).

children.label: metadata
signature: { name: string; description?: string | undefined; owner?: string | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; }

children.label: recovery_policy
signature: { type: any; query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined

children.label: state_transition
signature: { pending_count?: number | undefined; pending_timeframe?: string | undefined; recovering_count?: number | undefined; recovering_timeframe?: string | undefined; } | undefined

children.label: push
description: Whether to use push flyout or overlay

children.label: onClose
description: Callback when flyout is closed

children.label: query
description: Initial query for the rule (only used on mount)

children.label: services
description: Required services

children.label: query
description: Initial query for the rule

children.label: layout
description: Layout mode: 'page' renders the preview side-by-side; 'flyout' uses a nested flyout. Default: 'page'.

children.label: onSubmit
description:
External submit handler. When provided, form submission delegates to this callback.
When omitted (and `includeSubmission` is true), the form uses `useCreateRule` internally.

children.label: onSuccess
description: Callback invoked after a successful internal submission (useCreateRule).

children.label: includeYaml
description: Whether to include YAML editor toggle (default: false). Requires services.application.

children.label: isDisabled
description: Whether the form is in a loading/disabled state

children.label: isSubmitting
description: Whether the form is currently submitting (controls button loading state)

children.label: includeSubmission
description: Whether to show submit/cancel buttons (default: false)

children.label: initialValues
description:
Optional initial form values to populate the form with (e.g. when editing an existing rule).
These are shallow-merged over the query-derived defaults.

children.label: ruleId
description: When provided, the form operates in edit mode and uses PATCH instead of POST on submission.

misc.label: RULE_FORM_ID
description: Form ID constant - only one rule form should exist at a time
